title: The Big Bang Of AI Just Happened: Cosmos 3
summary: NVIDIA launched Cosmos 3, a world model trained on video, audio, text, and action data for physical AI systems. It is part of NVIDIA's broader physical AI stack that includes Vera for agent CPU operations and the Isaac GR00T humanoid robot reference platform.
